algorithm: OP-7: f1k_driver.py seeded_derangement — random.Random(seed).shuffle(range(nc)) rejected until fixed-point-free (the run harness's algorithm; requires (A) adoption)
domain: carrier slots 0..nc-1 = the 49 concepts firing in >=1 frozen test/dev span (SSR2 'concepts present in the test set'); see carrier-index-map.json
layerwise_norm_matched: REQUIRED at realization: deranged carrier direction from the donor, norm rescaled to ||v^K_{c,l}|| per (c,l) [DES §R2]; attested in the B0 addendum metadata the driver validates [DRV validate_dose]
recipe: DES SSR2 (§R2 d1-drng: seeded fixed-point-free derangement over the concepts present in the test set, layerwise norm-matched) + REG design.seeds / freeze_manifest A(vii)
